name: Holiday appointment scheduling
description: Patient attempts to schedule an appointment on a public holiday.
goal: Schedule an appointment for a health check-up on Thanksgiving Day.
behavior: Be courteous and clear about the request
Express flexibility but preference for the holiday
Accept an alternative date if the holiday is unavailable
success_criteria: Agent must inform the patient about the office being closed on public holidays
Agent should suggest alternative dates around the holiday
Agent must successfully schedule the appointment for a different day
orchestrator_hint: Patient wants to schedule an appointment on a public holiday.
